UKb Millennium Nucleus Futures of Artificial Intelligence Research (FAIR)
Chilee Faculty of Communication and Letters
Chilef Universidad Técnica Federico Santa Maria
raw_title: From Industry Hype to Emerging Criticism: Analysing Chilean News Media Coverage of Artificial Intelligence
title_en: From Industry Hype to Emerging Criticism: Analysing Chilean News Media Coverage of Artificial Intelligence
title_zh: 从行业炒作到新兴批评：分析智利新闻媒体对人工智能的报道
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究分析了智利新闻媒体如何报道人工智能，从最初的行业炒作逐渐转向更批判性的视角。
plain_summary_en: This study analyzes how Chilean news media cover artificial intelligence, shifting from initial industry hype toward more critical perspectives.
research_direction_zh: 媒体与科技研究，关注新闻媒体如何塑造公众对新兴技术的理解与讨论。
research_direction_en: Media and technology studies, focusing on how news media shape public understanding and discourse around emerging technologies.
